mentions.note: Satellite geolocation/signals intelligence for defense and AI; IPO at $26 now $34 with strong fundamentals (110% growth, $285M backlog, pristine balance sheet); unique opportunity.

Space and defense company with 30 satellites gathering signals and intelligence for governments worldwide; analysts are pretty darn bullish; down from $33 to $24 due to satellite stock liquidation for SpaceX; clear rotation play but fundamental thesis unchanged.
